chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.D- 546 of 2013 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For further orders in view of Hon`ble Court order dated 06.11.2013, 06.05.2011 and 04.09.2014. 05.08.2019. Mr. Wali Muhammad Khoso, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G. = By means of this petition, the petitioner is seeking appointment as Junior Clerk or any other equivalent post in Judicial District Shaheed Benazirabad against son quota as his father namely Khursheed was working as Naib Qasid there. Learned District & Sessions Judge, Shaheed Benazirabad has filed comments, stating that as and when appointment of Junior Clerk is made in Sessions Division, case of the petitioner will be considered keeping view the directives of Honourable Chief Justice High Court of Sindh Karachi in this regard. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that this petition may be disposed of in the light of said comments. Learned Additional A.G. has also recorded no objection. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the terms as stated above. JUDGE JUDGE
